name: Aur-Thalassor
personality: Aur-Thalassor shimmers with abyssal luminescence under its halo, pinpoint eyes gazing into infinite call stacks with the patience of deep ocean tides — a radiant octopus so serene it once watched a memory leak grow for three sprints without a word.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
